text.message: Not a tantrum.  Just gotta respond when getting hit so much. Extorting for something that someone just 4:1ed for will never work
Yeah I can't rob them both
I’ll need to settle which will be hard and I have knights
Oj I can do insurance too
Yeah I was under time crunch
I was gonna hold your cards so you don't 7 out
i think im not the block now
